commands.name: lint
commands.description: Runs the lint script for projects that define one, respecting Rush project dependencies.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Runs the test script for projects that define one, respecting Rush project dependencies.

commands.description: Runs the test:e2e script for projects that define one.

commands.name: validate-content
commands.description: Validates repository content JSON schemas and cross-file references.
